## Objective
Describe the business and user outcome.

## Current problem
What is wrong or missing now?

## Scope
- [ ] Japanese page
- [ ] English page
- [ ] Desktop
- [ ] Mobile
- [ ] SEO metadata
- [ ] Accessibility / contrast

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Source updated
- [ ] Build succeeds
- [ ] Required pages verified
- [ ] JP/EN paired links verified
- [ ] Desktop checked
- [ ] Mobile checked
- [ ] Production URL checked

## URLs
List affected production and staging URLs.

## Notes
Include screenshots, copy requirements, legal constraints, or references.
